title: Employment forfeiting benefits
doc_html:
§2038.  Employment forfeiting benefits

No person shall receive benefits from the fund if he attaches himself to a paid fire department in any municipality, or accepts public employment for compensation equal to or greater than the benefits herein provided.
doc_text:
§2038.  Employment forfeiting benefits
No person shall receive benefits from the fund if he attaches himself to a paid fire department in any municipality, or accepts public employment for compensation equal to or greater than the benefits herein provided.
